examples: Lord Shutt of Greetland, replying for the government, acknowledged that there was "an appetite" for an inquiry into Mr Finucane's death.
Lord Shutt of Greetland, for ministers, told peers there was still "a lot to be done" before the planned switchover in 2015.
Lord Shutt confirmed that it was "indeed" the government's position, and that ministers wanted see work continued through groups such as the Historical Enquiries Team (HET).
